title: Silvia Calvet Martin on Incorruptible
summary: Silvia Calvet Martin plans to use the book's frameworks in her workshops with entrepreneurs and innovators.
blockquote: In a time of global imbalance, where success is often measured exclusively in terms of money, market share, and short-term profits, I see Incorruptible as a wake-up call for our collective consciousness. It challenges deeply embedded assumptions about what success means and invites us to rethink the purpose of entrepreneurship itself. Through Incorruptible, I've found concrete examples and guidance that help me support founders and teams in fundamentally rethinking how they build companies--moving away from purely profit-driven models toward organizations designed to generate long-term, positive impact for society and the planet.
